---
title: "Projects"
format:
  html:
    allow-html: true
---

# Project Portfolio

<div>
  <img src="images/Stat_Arb.png" alt="Statistical Arbitrage" width="400">
  <p><b>Systematic Stat Arb Trade Desk:</b> Full-stack execution system deploying real-time mean reversion and momentum strategies using Python, R, and SQL.</p>
</div>
<div>
  <img src="images/Latency_Arbitrage.png" alt="Geo-Spatial Latency Arbitrage" width="400">
  <p><b>Geo-Spatial Latency Arbitrage:</b> Optimizes cross-market spreads with real-time rerouting using Prometheus, PowerShell, and Grafana.</p>
</div>
<div>
  <img src="images/NLP_Pipelines.png" alt="Alt Data NLP Pipeline" width="400">
  <p><b>Alt Data NLP Pipeline:</b> Extracts alpha from 10-Qs, earnings calls, and filings using transformer models and integrates them into multifactor engines.</p>
</div>
<div>
  <img src="images/Monte_Carlo_and_Forecasting.png" alt="Monte Carlo + GARCH Forecasting" width="400">
  <p><b>Monte Carlo + GARCH Forecasting:</b> Equity price prediction engine combining time-series simulation and stochastic volatility models (R, ggplot2).</p>
</div>
